Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows markedly elevated creatinine and proteinuria, suggesting significant renal impairment, possibly chronic kidney disease. Low urine specific gravity and abnormal urine appearance further support renal dysfunction. Metabolic acidosis is indicated by low CO₂. LDL cholesterol is mildly elevated. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment of renal function and underlying etiology.
